publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, canonical fill-gap, and no code task for Type hints and static checking concepts; every item remains blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: Type hints and static checking concepts: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Python: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? Annotations reject wrong values automatically at runtime and typing.cast converts an object into the requested type.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Compare each option with both the language-specific boundary case and the cited operational model.

feedback.correct: Correct. Type hints guide static analysis but are not runtime enforcement; validate untrusted values explicitly and use cast only to inform the checker.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Type hints guide static analysis but are not runtime enforcement; validate untrusted values explicitly and use cast only to inform the checker.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction and rejects the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify source fidelity and ensure the distractor remains plausible without teaching it as fact.

items.title: Type hints and static checking concepts: canonical checkpoint

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

feedback.correct: Correct. The checkpoint is 'not runtime enforcement'. Type hints guide static analysis but are not runtime enforcement; validate untrusted values explicitly and use cast only to inform the checker.
feedback.incorrect: The phrase must preserve the exact language rule. Type hints guide static analysis but are not runtime enforcement; validate untrusted values explicitly and use cast only to inform the checker.

criteria.description: Supplies the exact canonical checkpoint phrase that completes the source-aligned correction.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the accepted phrase and whether additional spelling variants are technically equivalent.
